# ECRS

> An intergenerational organization providing creative and engaging activities that are fun, develop leadership, and build community. Come to Play. Play to Learn. Based in the greater Boston area.

ECRS runs events open to all ages and experience levels. Newcomers receive 50% off their first event. The organization focuses on participant-led fun, creative expression, and genuine human connection — folk dance, music, drama, crafts, and more.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ecrs.org/): Overview of ECRS, its mission, and upcoming events.
- [Events](https://ecrs.org/events): Browse and register for upcoming ECRS events.
- [About](https://ecrs.org/about): The story, values, and history of ECRS.
- [Our People](https://ecrs.org/our-people): Meet the ECRS board and community.
- [Membership](https://ecrs.org/membership): Join ECRS for member discounts and voting rights.
- [Contact](https://ecrs.org/contact): Send a question or message to ECRS.
- [Donate](https://ecrs.org/donate): Support ECRS with a one-time or recurring donation.
- [Privacy Policy](https://ecrs.org/privacy): How ECRS handles personal data.

## Feeds

- [Sitemap](https://ecrs.org/sitemap-index.xml): Full sitemap for all pages.
